title: T-010 — Warehouse outbox event types catalog
prompt:
# T-010 — Warehouse outbox event catalog

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §5.1 (#11 outbox), §7.6, §11.4.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Declare the warehouse-owned outbox event types in shared catalog so emitters can reference them by enum.

## Implementation contract
Extend `packages/outbox/src/event-types.ts` (assume already created in 00-FOUNDATION) with warehouse events: `lp.reserved`, `lp.consumed`, `lp.split`, `lp.merged`, `lp.expired`, `lp.quarantined`, `lp.qa_changed`, `lp.blocked`, `lp.shipped`, `lp.scrapped`, `grn.completed`. Provide TS payload types per §7.6 schema. No emitters here (T-047 owns).

## Files (scope)
- packages/outbox/src/event-types.ts [modify]
- packages/outbox/src/warehouse-events.ts [create]
- packages/outbox/src/__tests__/warehouse-events.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given consumers import the WarehouseEventType union, when assigning an unknown literal, then TypeScript raises a type error.
2. Given a `grn.completed` payload is constructed without lp_ids array, when validated by Zod schema, then it rejects with a clear error.
3. Given the test runs, when listing all warehouse event types, then 11 entries are returned matching PRD list.

## Test strategy
- RED: warehouse-events.test.ts checks union exhaustiveness and Zod payload validation for grn.completed.
- Run `pnpm --filter outbox test warehouse-events`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not emit events here.
- Do not change foundation outbox table schema.
- Do not introduce wildcard event type strings.

pipeline_inputs.description: Declare 11 warehouse outbox event types and Zod payload schemas per §7.6 / §11.4.
pipeline_inputs.details: Extend shared outbox catalog with WarehouseEventType union. Provide Zod schemas for each payload. No emitters here.
acceptance_criteria: Given consumers assign 'lp.unknown' to WarehouseEventType, when compiled, then TypeScript raises a type error
Given a grn.completed payload is constructed without lp_ids, when validated by Zod, then it rejects
Given the test enumerates warehouse event types, when run, then 11 entries match the PRD list
test_strategy: RED: warehouse-events.test.ts checks union exhaustiveness and Zod schema
risk_red_lines: Do not modify foundation outbox table
Do not allow wildcard event names
